name: Instacart
notes: Grocery delivery giant. DIRECT revenue alignment — Spirit Library users can buy cocktail ingredients via Instacart from within the app. Shopping cart integration is the core pitch. Instacart Ads / affiliate program opportunity.

name: DoorDash
notes: DoorDash Grocery and DoorDash Alcohol delivery (via DashMart and partner liquor stores). Shopping cart integration from Spirit Library recipes to DoorDash. Affiliate or API integration pitch.

name: Uber Eats
notes: Uber Eats has alcohol delivery in many markets (via Drizly integration after acquisition). Shopping cart integration from Spirit Library to Uber Eats. Massive reach + alcohol-specific angle.

name: Drizly (Uber)
notes: Alcohol-only delivery platform (now part of Uber Eats). MOST direct fit — Spirit Library users browsing a cocktail recipe can hit 'Order ingredients' and buy the exact spirits via Drizly. Perfect API integration candidate.

name: ReserveBar
notes: Premium spirits e-commerce and delivery. Upscale audience matches Spirit Library users. Shopping cart integration for premium spirits purchase. Affiliate program.

name: Minibar Delivery
notes: Alcohol delivery with 1-hour delivery option. Very direct fit — cocktail recipe → order spirits immediately. Shopping cart feature partnership.

name: Saucey
notes: 30-minute alcohol delivery. Mobile-first brand — perfect for Spirit Library in-app shopping cart integration. Partnership to power the Spirit Library shopping cart.

name: Total Wine & More
notes: Largest independent alcohol retailer in the US. In-store pickup + delivery. Spirit Library shopping cart could link to Total Wine for ingredient purchase. B2B partnership for their cocktail recipe content.

name: BevMo!
notes: West Coast alcohol retailer. Spirit Library shopping cart + in-store pickup for recipe ingredients.

name: Amazon Fresh
notes: Amazon's grocery delivery with alcohol in select markets. Spirit Library shopping cart integration via Amazon affiliate links.

name: Gopuff
notes: Instant delivery including alcohol and mixers. Perfect for last-minute cocktail ingredient orders from Spirit Library recipes.

name: Thrive Market
notes: Membership-based specialty grocery. Carries premium mixers, bitters, cocktail accessories. Spirit Library shopping cart for premium cocktail ingredients.
